reviews.comment:
Cargue gas oil en este sitio y no me ofrecieron limpieza de vidrios ni el ticket, cuando quise pasar al baño tuve que ir hasta la tienda para pedir la llave y me hablaron de muy mala manera.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with diesel at this place and they didn't offer me windshield cleaning or a receipt. When I wanted to go to the bathroom, I had to go all the way to the store to ask for the key and they spoke to me very rudely.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndDlqNDRBRRAB
